item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Naloxone Access Act
item.description:
👀 Federal Naloxone Access

What

Federal naloxone access expansion in the 119th Congress (overdose-reversal medication).

What it does

  • OTC access codification · Medicaid coverage standards · community-distribution liability protections · cooperative-class community-health-worker provisions.

Composes

Opioid Settlement Funds Protection + Rural Mental Health Access.

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
